Have you played Minecraft for awhile now and ever thought?..... Gee what I wouldn't give to be able to dye grass blocks to colors I could actually use for my builds?

 

 

Well Guess what!

 

NOW YOU CAN!!!!!!!!

 

I would like to Proudly introduce you to.....

 

TINTED GRASS!!!!!

 

Tinted Grass is a mod that allows you to add colored dyes into the crafting grid with 1 grass block at the center, allowing you to change their color.



![recipes](https://i.imgur.com/G3q9NdB.png)


<details>

You Are Free To Use This In Modpacks!

Please Report Any Issues to the issue tracker. It will redirect you to the appropriate Discord Channel!!!!
